action.reasoning: Observation: test_preprocess fully succeeds (FULL SEQUENTIAL PREPROCESS with language merge after Pi0NewLine/Tokenizer, preserves obs/images/state with exact PIL 224x224 base_0_rgb/left_wrist_0_rgb/right_wrist_0_rgb from rgb[0/2/3], padded 32D state/action, complementary_data+task). test_obs runs mock with real PI0 actions (success=1.0, no image-missing error, prints real pos/euler/grip). predict.py was truncated causing fallback in full eval (all prior 28 iters 0.0). RecordingEvaluator, PI0 load, processors, chunking, delta bridge all validated. Analysis: Exact diagnostic pattern (deepcopy+merge-after-lang-steps, PIL resize to 224, view mapping, dummy_action=32, predict_action_chunk+postprocess+pending queue) resolves training-pipeline mutation and produces real policy outputs. Full non-truncated predict.py copying this exactly into PI0Agent (complete _prepare_observation, _safe_preprocess with per-step prints disabled in prod, tuned _action_to_ee delta pos*0.05/euler*0.25/grip>0.5->1/-1, full main with eval_config.json+track_path parsing, complete RecordingEvaluator per contract) will eliminate fallback. Matches intended Pi0 track (LIBERO-pretrained on similar pick/place should now give >0 success on add_condiment/select_*). Last iteration: write complete predict.py, validate with tests, submit_eval on base for final non-zero success_rate (time left ~6h).
